title: Anime Inventory Pets
description:
If you are looking for
Anime Inventory Pets that give you amazing effects then this mod is for you
body:
In this mod you will find several anime characters that when they are in your inventory give you incredible effects. Some characters present in the mod are:

-Arceus -Ankylomon -Armadillomon -Bakemon -Big Shield Gardna -Digmon -Dodrio -Electrode -Garudamon -Mushmon -Pikachu -Submarimon -Togemon -Voltorb
